name: Proline Bentonite Clumping Cat Litter - Vanilla Scented 5L
description: Proline Bentonite Clumping Vanilla Scented Cat Litter , 100% natural bentonite cat litter instantly clumps. Excellent pelletising, instantly lumps Neutralises odour with fresh vanilla scent. Non-toxic and 100% natural Thin grain shape Prevents bacterial growth. Upon first use, we recommend adding new cat litter to the surface of the old cat litter for a few days.
